raw_consumer_statement: I had to pick this option since my issue is not listed here. I used to have a credit card with Citicards CBNA which I closed on XX/XX/2021. The card was opened on XX/XX/2021. I desperately need the statements for the month of XXXX and XX/XX/2021 as a proof for NY XXXX XXXX payment. Failure to do so is causing me a repayment of {$1500.00} which I have already paid using the Citi Bank credit card. It's been XXXX weeks I have been trying to retrieve my statements which is a common procedure with financial companies even if the accounts are closed. The companies are suppose to keep the data for some years to avoid this type of situations. I have provided my social security number, name, address, XXXX, phone number but they keep asking me for the Credit card account number. How am I supposed to know the number of a card that I closed if the issuer doesn't even know. My credit report also shows the detail that I used to have the credit card with Citi.
